# fcs_harbor_registry_binding (Resource)

Installs a server-managed pull-only Harbor credential in an existing tenant cluster namespace. Credential material stays in Harbor and Kubernetes and is never returned to or stored by Terraform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Tenant-owned business, flex or dedicated cluster UUID.
- `environment_id` (String) Owning FCS environment UUID.
- `namespace` (String) Existing namespace in the tenant cluster.

### Optional

- `rotation_trigger` (String) Arbitrary provider-local marker. Changing it rotates the pull credential entirely server-side without exposing it to Terraform state.
- `secret_name` (String) Name of the binding-owned dockerconfigjson Secret.
- `service_accounts` (Set of String) ServiceAccounts whose imagePullSecrets receive this binding.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) FCS registry binding ID (UUID).
- `project` (String) Tenant Harbor project derived by the API.
- `registry` (String) Registry hostname.
- `status` (String) Binding lifecycle status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last reconciliation timestamp.
